channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
item.description: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand.

item.title: J’ai testé la Huawei Watch Fit 5, certainement l’une des meilleures montres à moins de 200 €
item.description: La Huawei Watch Fit 5 est une montre connectée grand public polyvalente, bien finie et endurante. Nous l’avons portée au poignet pendant plus de deux semaines pour évaluer ses capacités.

item.title: With a new $100M raise, Princeton’s Thea Energy is now a top-funded fusion startup
item.description: Thea Energy's pixel-inspired magnets could give its power plant plans a boost. The fusion startup hopes to get a commercial reactor working by 2034.

item.title: A Dating App Is Giving Away Free Gas to Convince People to Get Out of the House
item.description: Amid ongoing economic anxieties, BLK and other companies are giving away basic essentials to appeal to the public.

item.title: 'Adversaries are no longer just targeting products, they're targeting the developers who build them': CrowdStrike takes down major botnet targeting developers across the world
item.description: The Glassworm botnet is no more, thanks to coordinated efforts between CrowdStrike, Google, and the Shadowserver Foundation.

item.title: Valve raises Steam Deck prices by more than $200
item.description: Valve has significantly increased the price of the Steam Deck - but now, it's also in stock. The 512GB Steam Deck OLED now costs $789, up from $549, while the 1TB model costs $949, up from $649. As I write this, both models are available to buy on Steam with an estimated delivery date of […]

item.title: The free PlayStation Plus Essential games for June have been revealed — and they include an Xbox-published game
item.description: PlayStation Plus Essential June 2026 games included Grounded, a former Xbox exclusive.

item.title: Huawei Watch Fit 5 Pro review: A slim, powerful Apple Watch alternative
item.description: The Huawei Watch Fit 5 Pro is nicely designed, accurate and pleasant to wear.

item.title: 007 First Light : pourquoi le jeu fâche les possesseurs de cartes graphiques AMD
item.description: Mauvaise surprise pour les utilisateurs de cartes graphiques AMD sur 007 First Light. Le jeu propose une intégration datée du FSR, resté figé en version 3.1, sans possibilité de mise à niveau manuelle via le panneau de configuration de la marque. Un traitement de faveur regrettable quand on sait que le titre intègre l'ensemble des dernières technologies de Nvidia. ...

item.title: Une stratégie en matière d’IA sera dévoilée par Ottawa la semaine prochaine
item.description: Le gouvernement fédéral dévoilera sa stratégie tant attendue en matière d’intelligence artificielle (IA) d’ici quelques jours, a annoncé mercredi le premier ministre Mark Carney.

item.title: Existing Fitbit users may be 'beyond frustrated' with the app's Google Health redesign, but having just got my hands on the Google Fitbit Air, I'm actually impressed at the AI integration on offer
item.description: Pulling the weather in and updating my fitness plan is easier than ever.

item.title: The Verge’s 2026 college graduation gift guide
item.description: Graduating from college is exciting, but it can also feel slightly terrifying. Along with celebrating a huge accomplishment, many grads jump right into looking for a job. Some might be getting their first apartment, too, which brings on a whole new set of responsibilities. That's why getting the right graduation gift is so important: They […]

item.title: This modern typewriter wants to eliminate distractions and help you focus on writing — say hello to the Zerowriter Fold, a new e-ink device that’s like a Kindle with a keyboard
item.description: The Zerowriter Fold is an e-ink word processor that wants to put the focus back into writing.

item.title: How to watch Crystal Palace vs. Rayo Vallecano online for free
item.description: How to watch Conference League for free. Live stream Crystal Palace vs. Rayo Vallecano in the Conference League final for free.

item.title: CrowdStrike and Google take down botnet used by hackers to target software developers in supply chain attacks
item.description: Cybercriminals used the Glassworm botnet to infect open source software projects with malware, and in turn hack the developers and companies that use that software.

item.title: YouTube will automatically detect and label AI-generated videos
item.description: It should be easier to tell at a glance if a YouTube video will contain AI-generated gunk.

item.title: Vente de SFR : pourquoi le rachat à 20 milliards d’euros va piquer pour vos abonnements
item.description: Après des mois de rumeurs et d'annonces avortées, le démantèlement de SFR pour 20,35 milliards d'euros par ses trois rivaux entre dans sa dernière ligne droite. Pour les 25 millions d'abonnés de l'opérateur au carré rouge, cette transition historique marque la fin d'une époque et laisse planer de sérieuses menaces sur le pouvoir d'achat.

item.title: You can print, slice, and engrave using this desktop crafting machine
item.description: xTool has announced a new multi-purpose crafting machine that could potentially be one of the most affordable ways to start an Etsy shop. Its modular design facilitates a CMYK print head that works on multiple materials including paper, wood, and felt. It can later be swapped with laser-based cutting and engraving tools. You can use […]

item.title: Square Enix restarted development on Dragon Quest 12 and gave it a new name
item.description: Square Enix has rebooted its next mainline entry in the Dragon Quest series, which is now called Dragon Quest XII: Beyond Dreams.

item.title: Motorola says affiliate hijacking of Amazon app was ‘unintended’
item.description: Motorola says that recently discovered behavior, which saw some of its phones sending users to an affiliate tracking website before opening the Amazon app, was "unintended" and has been "promptly corrected." The company didn't explain how the error was introduced in the first place. "Recently, Motorola acted quickly to resolve an issue that was identified, […]...

item.title: Sony is offering up to 50 percent off some of our favorite PS5 games
item.description: Even without E3, the transition from spring to summer is a busy time for the gaming industry. Summer Game Fest is right around the corner, and Sony is kicking things off with a State of Play on June 2nd with an extended look at Insomniac’s upcoming Wolverine game. To mark the occasion, Sony is also hosting […]

item.title: Backrooms review: A24's liminal horror is the perfect adaptation of the creepypasta, and die-hard fans will adore it
item.description: Backrooms is finally on the big screen and I think long term fans of the horror legend will be very pleased indeed.

item.title: Pourquoi les États-Unis épargnent Volvo malgré leur blocage strict contre la Chine ?
item.description: Alors que les États-Unis durcissent leur réglementation sur les technologies chinoises dans les voitures connectées, Volvo vient d'obtenir une dérogation officielle lui permettant de continuer à vendre ses modèles sur le marché américain. Mais comment le constructeur suédois, sous le contrôle du chinois Geely, est-il parvenu à ce tour de force ?

item.title: Add a Google Pixel Watch 4 to your wrist for $40 off
item.description: As of May 27, get $40 off the Google Pixel Watch 4 at Amazon.

item.title: 8 Best Computer Speakers (2026) After Testing 25+ Pairs
item.description: These WIRED-tested computer speakers, from stereo speakers to surround sound, will suit any budget.

item.title: Fuite Oura Ring 5 : plus petite, 30 euros plus chère que la Ring 4, mais l’abonnement mensuel reste le point noir
item.description: Des visuels marketing fuités pointent vers une annonce de l'Oura Ring 5 dès demain, 28 mai 2026. Design retravaillé, sept jours d'autonomie promis, 429 euros en entrée de gamme : les fuites livrent presque tout.

item.title: I added one sentence to my ChatGPT prompts — and suddenly the advice became way more useful for real life
item.description: I discovered that adding one simple instruction to ChatGPT prompts made its advice feel less idealized and much more useful for everyday life

item.title: The FBI just dropped its 2025 internet crime report. Here are 6 big takeaways
item.description: Online crime complaints surpassed 1 million for the first time last year, driven by a spike in AI-enabled fraud, crypto scams, and phishing attacks. Cybercriminals have been keeping busy. The 2025 Internet Crime Report from the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) shows a continued rise in internet crime complaints, with officials receiving more than 3,000 per day and the annual total surpassing 1 million for the first time. (And that figure is likely far below the actual total, since many victims never report these crimes.)...

item.title: Newegg just dropped a massive NAS sale with huge storage savings for SMBs and enterprises — here are the must-buy deals on Seagate IronWolf and WD Red hard drives
item.description: From standalone drives to combo bundles, these are the network-attached storage deals you don't want to miss.

item.title: Province of Canada is releasing the Heated Rivalry fleece on June 3. Heres how to pre-order.
item.description: The 'Heated Rivalry' fleece is releasing on June 3 at noon ET from Province of Canada

item.title: Worrying open-source security issue 'BadHost' could affect millions of AI agents, experts warn
item.description: The risk is "materially understated", researchers are saying as passwords and critical data can be exfiltrated.

item.title: Sony Bravia Theatre Trio : trois enceintes (ou plus) pour un home cinéma vraiment immersif
item.description: Sony présente le Bravia Theatre Trio, un système home cinéma sans fil à trois enceintes conçu pour accompagner ses nouveaux téléviseurs grand format.

item.title: Sony lance ses nouveautés Bravia : du True RGB pour sublimer la TV
item.description: Les Bravia 9 II et Bravia 7 II de Sony sont officiels et ils signent la prise de controle du constructeur japonais sur la technologie LED RGB. Avant le test, voici un tour de propriétaire des nouveaux téléviseurs de Sony.

item.title: DJIs 4K Osmo Action 4 camera just dropped to $209
item.description: As of May 27, you can get the DJI Osmo Action 4 for $208.98 at Amazon, down from $299. That's a 30% discount or $90.02 savings.
